name: Wonder Woman - In the Lands of Unknown
description:
When she opens her eyes, Diana finds herself utterly speechless. She isn’t in her bedroom in her home in America, nor in Themyscira. She is instead lying on the ground, for a while at least it seems. Most likely she had been unconscious for quite a some time, as she's ended up here.

But where is this 'here'? The Pricness of Themyscira has absolutely no idea. She has never seen this place in her long life, nor there is anything around at all that would make some identification. Needless to say, she's completely alone. As far as her eyes can see, there is nobody an nothing around her. She's totally stranded in this unknown place.

But, why? She tries to jog her memory, but even with all the efforts, can't really make out what happened to her that has got her here or made her lose her senses in the first place. More she things, the mystery just deepens and becomes more and more confusing. Her lasso, all her weapons and her tiara, everything is intact. And she's completely unharmed, at least it seems at the moment. So who brought her here? And why? And most importantly, where is she? And how can she return to her home now?

You can help her find her way back and unravel the mysterious place, or make the life difficult for her. You can also play as Diana if you want. Your choice.
creator: User3920124
